description: Add a required System.Threading.CancellationToken parameter to the CanCloseAsync method declared on the IWorkspace interface.
Add a new method `int CountMatches(string searchText)` to the IGridSearchAdapter interface that returns how many times the given text occurs.

In src/TemplateBlueprint.Core/Services/CsvImportService.cs only, add an XML documentation comment (///) above the DetectColumnType helper method describing what it returns. Do not modify ExcelImportService or any other import service.

In src/TemplateBlueprint.Core/Services/CsvImportService.cs only, rename a local variable inside the DetectColumnType method to a clearer name; this is a purely local rename. Do not modify ExcelImportService or any other import service.

In src/Numerics/SpecialFunctions/Gamma.cs, GammaLn and Gamma each repeat the Lanczos coefficient summation loops in their z < 0.5 and z >= 0.5 branches. Refactor this duplication by extracting the coefficient-summation loop into a private static helper and call it from the four sites. Do not change public signatures or numeric constants.
